Japanese: な‥‥なんですか？
English: What on earth is that?

Japanese: この、ヒトをバカにしたような オモチャのバッジは‥‥
English: What an insult to think anyone could be fooled by such a childish imitation!

Japanese: （そのオモチャにダマされた 裁判長は、なんなんだ！）
English: (Consider yourself insulted, Your Honor!)

Japanese: ‥‥芝九蔵さん。
English: Mr. Tigre.

Japanese: あなたは、事件当日、 被害者を演じただけじゃない。
English: You didn't just pose as the victim on the day in question.

Japanese: １ヶ月前の法廷で‥‥あなたは、 このぼくを演じたんです！
English: A month ago, in this very court, you posed as me!

Japanese: なんですって‥‥！ そんな‥‥そんなコトが‥‥
English: Whaaat!? That's... That's...

Japanese: ‥‥ジジツです。
English: ...The truth.

Japanese: だって‥‥‥‥ゼンゼン 似てないではないですかッ！
English: But! The witness looks nothing like you, Mr. Wright!

Japanese: ‥‥‥しかし。
English: Although...

Japanese: 言われてみれば‥‥ たしかに、あなたでした。
English: Now that I think about it, it was you, wasn't it?

Japanese: あなたは‥‥ たしかに、１ヶ月前。
English: No doubt it was you... Standing in here, this very court, a mere month ago.

Japanese: 最低の弁護をした、みっともない 弁護士・成歩堂　龍一です！
English: The Phoenix Wright who put up the most disreputable, shabby defense I had ever seen!
Grrr...

Japanese: ぐわおおおおおおおおおおおおッ！
English: Grrraaaaaaaaargh!

Japanese: じゃあ、ジイさん！ アンタは、立証できるのか？
English: Can you prove that, gramps?

Japanese: １ヶ月前の“弁護士”が このオトコだった、とッ！
English: Prove the "attorney" who represented the accused here a month ago was this man.

Japanese: 証言台に立って 立証できるって言うのかッ！
English: Are you prepared to take the stand and testify that it was him!?
...*gulp*

Japanese: ふ、ふむう‥‥‥‥
English: H-Hmm...

Japanese: ‥‥ちょっと‥‥
English: H-Hey...

Japanese: おっちゃん‥‥ か、カンベンしてェな。
English: F-Forget about it, yeah?

Japanese: ワイ、そんなんチャウで。 やってへん、やってへん。
English: I wouldn't do somethin' like that. Not me.

Japanese: なァ‥‥、見まちがいやろ？ そう言ってぇな、おっちゃんやァ。
English: You... You made a mistake, right? It was someone else, huh?

Japanese: ぷ‥‥プライドはないんですか！ あなたには‥‥
English: Have you no pride, sir!?

Japanese: ‥‥コイツは プライドの問題じゃねえ。
English: This isn't a matter of pride.

Japanese: オレたちは法廷にいて‥‥ イノチのやりとりをしているのさ！
English: In case you didn't know, Trite, here in court, we deal with people's lives!
Nrrrgh...

Japanese: そのとおりですな。
English: Mr. Godot is right.

Japanese: さ、裁判長‥‥！
English: Your Honor!?

Japanese: “個人”としての私には、 カクシンがあります。
English: Speaking for myself, I am absolutely convinced.

Japanese: あの弁護士は、この証人だった！ ‥‥しかし‥‥！
English: The attorney in question was the witness standing before me now! However...

Japanese: 私は今、判決を下す立場‥‥ “裁判長”として法廷にいます。
English: I preside over this court as the judge! With the vested power to hand down a verdict.

Japanese: 証拠のない“記憶”などに 左右されるわけにはいきません！
English: Someone in my position cannot be swayed by a memory without evidence to support it.

Japanese: そんなああああああッ！
English: Nooooooo!

Japanese: 弁護側に証拠がない以上‥‥ この証人の審理は、ここまでです。
English: If the defense has no further evidence, the court will now excuse the witness.

Japanese: きわめて疑わしいが、 ‥‥決定的ではない！
English: The circumstances surrounding Mr. Tigre are dubious for sure, but not conclusive!

Japanese: そ‥‥そんな‥‥ ここまで来たのに！
English: But we've come so far!

Japanese: 岡　高夫に変装しようが、 弁護士に変装しようが‥‥
English: You say he impersonated Glen Elg. You say he impersonated you.

Japanese: それが“殺人罪”を 立証するワケじゃねえ。
English: But none of that adds up to a murder charge.

Japanese: コーヒーに毒を入れた 証拠なんか、どこにもねえぜ！
English: You don't have a shred of evidence that the witness poisoned the victim's coffee!

Japanese: うおおおおおおおおおおおおおおお おおおおおおおおおおおおおおッ！
English: Nnaaaaaaaaaaaargh!
Ha!

Japanese: ザンネンだったのォ、成歩堂‥‥
English: Sucks to be you, Wright.

Japanese: このゼニトラァ！ ナメたらメチャ、しょっぱいでェ！
English: Don't mess with The Tiger, or you're gonna get mauled, youse got that!?

Japanese: （この裁判‥‥アイツを 追いつめるしかなかった‥‥）
English: (All we managed to do here was chase him around a bit.)

Japanese: （“自分からツミを認めさせる” ‥‥もう少しだったのに‥‥）
English: (But I was so close to getting him to admit his own guilt!)

Japanese: クッ‥‥！
どうやら‥‥もう、 おかわりは必要ないようだぜ。
English: Looks like I won't be needing a refill.

Japanese: （証拠が‥‥あと１つ。 あと１つだけあれば‥‥）
English: (If I just had one more piece of evidence...)

Japanese: （マコちゃんを‥‥ 助けられるのに‥‥！）
English: (One more piece of evidence and maybe I could get Maggey off the hook!)

Japanese: それでは、この証人の 審理は、これで終了します！
English: This witness's cross- examination is over. You are free to go, Mr. Tigre!

Japanese: ‥‥その裁判‥‥
English: ...Your Honor, sir...

Japanese: ちょっと、待ったァァァァッ！
English: Waaaaaaaait!

Japanese: あ、あなたは‥‥
English: D-Detective!

Japanese: イトノコ刑事ィィィィッ！
English: Detective Gumshoe!

Japanese: お待たせしたッス！ この自分が‥‥自分がッ！ I... I...
English: Sorry I took so long, pal!

Japanese: 消えそうな刑事生命のすべてを かけて、今ここにッ！
English: I staked everything on this. My badge... The works!

Japanese: 持ってきたッス！ 燃えそうなアイのためにッ！
English: So here it is! My heart's counting on this, too!

Japanese: い‥‥いったい、何を‥‥？
English: Wh-What is it, Detective?

Japanese: ‥‥‥決まってるッス！ モチロン‥‥‥
English: Isn't it obvious, pal?

Japanese: 決定的な証拠ッスゥゥゥッ！
English: It's the final, decisive piece of evidence!
Wh...

Japanese: なんですっとォォォォォッ！
English: Whaaat!?

Japanese: 同日　午後　２時４８分 地方裁判所　被告人第１控え室
English: January 8, 2:48 PM District Court Defendant Lobby No. 1

Japanese: おそくなってすまないッス！ 検査結果が出たッス！
English: Sorry it took so long, pal. But I finally got the results from the lab.

Japanese: け‥‥“検査結果”‥‥？
English: The results?

Japanese: 指紋ッスよ！ この、クスリビンの‥‥！
English: About the prints, pal! From this medicine bottle!

Japanese: あ‥‥ッ！　どうでした？ わかりましたか、指紋のヌシ！
English: Oh! So? Do you know who the prints belong to now?

Japanese: もちろんッス！ 自分をナメちゃダメッス！
English: Do you think I'm some kind of hack detective? Of course I know!

Japanese: で？　で？　‥‥やっぱり、 ゼニトラだったんでしょ？　ヌシ。
English: So? Tell us! They're The Tiger's, right? I knew it!

Japanese: ふっふっふっ‥‥ モチロンッス！
English: Heh heh heh! You bet!

Japanese: この小ビンには‥‥ ハッキリ残っていたッス！
English: Clear as crystal, all over the bottle!

Japanese: 芝九蔵　虎ノ助の指紋がァッ！
English: They're Furio Tigre's paw prints alright!

Japanese: よおし！　やったぜ、 なるほどくん！
English: That's great! We've got him now, Nick!

Japanese: どーしたの、さっきから！ ダマりこんじゃって！
English: What's wrong with you!? You've hardly said a word since Detective Gumshoe got here.

Japanese: せっかく、イトノコさんが がんばってくれたのに‥‥
English: He's laid everything on the line for this, Nick.

Japanese: ‥‥ゴメン。 言いにくいんだけど‥‥
English: I know. Look, I'm sorry. This is kind of hard to say, but...

Japanese: 今さら、このビンにダレの指紋が ついていても‥‥イミがないんだ。
English: It really doesn't make any difference whose prints are on that bottle now.

Japanese: え‥‥！ ど、どういうコトッス？
English: Huh!? What!? Why not?

Japanese: 今、ぼくたちが提示しなければ ならないのは‥‥
English: What we need to produce at this stage in the trial...

Japanese: “芝九蔵がコーヒーに毒を入れた、 決定的な証拠”‥‥です。
English: ...is irrefutable evidence that The Tiger put poison in Glen Elg's coffee.

Japanese: 芝九蔵は、被害者と会ったことは もう、とっくに認めています。
English: He's already admitted that he met the victim.

Japanese: この小ビンにアイツの 指紋がついていても‥‥
English: The fact that his prints are on this bottle...

Japanese: 今となっては‥‥ まったく、イミがないんです。
English: That really doesn't make any difference now.
I knew it.

Japanese: こんなときでも‥‥ 自分は、役に立たないッスね。
English: Great... No matter how hard I try... I'm never of any use.

Japanese: イトノコさん‥‥
English: Hey, don't be so hard on yourself...

Japanese: これが‥‥マコクンを助けられる、 最後のチャンスだったのに‥‥
English: This was our last chance to help Maggey.

Japanese: 自分は‥‥なんのイミもないコトに 必死になって‥‥
English: And I've been working on some useless piece of evidence the whole time!

Japanese: ただのバカッスね、やっぱり。
English: It's alright. I'm a real loser. It's not breaking news to me, pal.
Um...

Japanese: イトノコ‥‥センパイ‥‥
English: Detective... Gumshoe...?

Japanese: あ‥‥ ま‥‥マコちゃん！
English: M-Maggey!

Japanese: センパイ‥‥アタシのために、 今まで‥‥？
English: You've been working on something... for me?

Japanese: ダメなセンパイッス。
English: Sorry I let you down, Maggey.

Japanese: マコクンが犯人じゃないコトは、 自分には、よくわかっているッス。
English: I know you didn't do it.

Japanese: ‥‥それなのに‥‥ 自分は‥‥刑事なのに‥‥
English: And I'm a detective! We're supposed to be able to prove stuff like that!

Japanese: すまねッス！　もー、 合わせるカオがないッス！
English: I'm really sorry! I'll get out of your hair now.

Japanese: い、イトノコセンパイ！
English: Detective Gumshoe! Wait!

Japanese: （行っちまった、か‥‥）
English: (He's gone...)

Japanese: なるほどくん！ なんとかならないの？
English: Isn't there anything we can do now, Nick?

Japanese: （‥‥なんとかしたいさ、 ぼくだって‥‥！）
English: (I wish there was!)

Japanese: （イトノコ刑事が‥‥必死で 持ってきてくれた、証拠品‥‥）
English: (Gumshoe worked so hard to get that evidence.)

Japanese: （何か‥‥使い道はないのか！ ‥‥何か‥‥！）
English: (If only there was some way I could use it...)

Japanese: 証拠品《小ビン》を ポケットにしまった。
English: Small Bottle put into pocket.

Japanese: 同日　午後　３時　４分 地方裁判所　第４法廷
English: January 8, 3:04 PM District Court Courtroom No. 4

Japanese: ‥‥弁護人。
English: Mr. Wright.

Japanese: ‥‥はい。
English: Yes, Your Honor.

Japanese: “決定的な証拠品が発見された” ということで休廷しましたが‥‥？
English: I granted you a recess so you could prepare this "decisive evidence" you've discovered.
Um... Yes...

Japanese: さっそく、提示してもらおうぜ。 その、《証拠品》とやらを。
English: Don't keep us all in suspense, Trite! Show us.
Naturally...

Japanese: 完全な立証能力を持つ 証拠品‥‥なんだろうなあ。
English: ...we can assume it's evidence that will actually stand up in court... can't we?

Japanese: （考えるんだ‥‥成歩堂　龍一！）
English: (Think, Phoenix!)

Japanese: （イトノコ刑事の努力を ムダにしないためにも‥‥！）
English: (Don't let Gumshoe's hard work go to waste!)

Japanese: フン！　アホらしいワ。 初めて裁判ってモンを見たケド‥‥
English: How much more of my time are youse gonna waste!? I ain't been to no court before...

Japanese: やっぱり、大したコトないのォ。 ‥‥弁護士なんて連中は！
English: ...but youse lawyers sure know how to blow things outta proportion!

Japanese: それが《決定的》である以上、 多くを語る必要はないはず。
English: No doubt, given the nature of the evidence, it will speak for itself.

Japanese: ただ、一度だけ‥‥ 証拠品の提示を認めましょう！
English: Nevertheless, you will talk us through it, Mr. Wright.

Japanese: （‥‥証拠品での立証は、 まず不可能だ‥‥）
English: (Well I know I can't prove anything new with this evidence.)

Japanese: （この絶体絶命のピンチ‥‥ つけいるスキがあるとすれば）
English: (I'm really backed into a corner here. But maybe if he thinks he's got me beat...)

Japanese: （勝利をカクシンした アイツの、気のゆるみ‥‥か！）
English: (...he'll let his guard down a bit!)

Japanese: それでは、弁護人。 ‥‥提示してください。
English: Don't keep us waiting any longer, Mr. Wright.

Japanese: 証人の犯行を立証する、 最後の証拠品を‥‥！
English: Present this final, decisive piece of evidence to the court!

Japanese: 正直、ガッカリしましたな。
English: Quite frankly, Mr. Wright, I'm disappointed.

Japanese: どんな決定的な証拠品が 提示されるのかと思えば‥‥
English: I was wondering what evidence you could possibly produce that would sway me...

Japanese: まあ‥‥決定的と 言えなくもないで、それ。
English: I see the idiot's point. That's decisive! Real decisive!

Japanese: 『ワイは無実！』‥‥これで、 決定的やなァ、成歩堂！
English: It's decisive in sayin' that I ain't guilty!

Japanese: おねがい、なるほどくん！
English: Come on, Nick!

Japanese: イトノコさんのキモチに こたえてあげて‥‥！
English: Don't let Gumshoe down!

Japanese: ‥‥これが、弁護側の提出する 最後の証拠品です！
English: This is the defense's final piece of evidence.

Japanese: こ、これは。 たしか、被害者の‥‥
English: Isn't that the victim's...?

Japanese: ‥‥裁判長。
English: Your Honor.

Japanese: こいつの中身は、法廷中の だれもが知っています。
English: Naturally, the court is already aware of the contents of this bottle.

Japanese: モンダイなのは‥‥
English: However, interesting new information has come to light.

Japanese: この小ビンに、ハッキリと 指紋が残っていることです！
English: We have clearly identified some fingerprints on it.

Japanese: 芝九蔵　虎ノ助‥‥証人！ あなたの指紋が！
English: Fingerprints belonging to you, Mr. Tigre!

Japanese: な‥‥なんやて‥‥？
English: What!?

Japanese: し‥‥しかし、成歩堂くん。
English: But, Mr. Wright...

Japanese: 今さら、その小ビンの指紋が どうしたと言うのですか‥‥？
English: What conclusion are you hoping to draw from this new information?

Japanese: （‥‥この法廷にいた人間は、 当然、ビンの中身を知っている）
English: (Everyone in here knows what this bottle contains.)

Japanese: （しかし‥‥たったひとりだけ！ 知らないはずの人物がいる‥‥）
English: (Except one man. One person in this courtroom should theoretically be in the dark.)

Japanese: そのチンケなビンに、ワイの 指紋がついている、やてェ‥‥？
English: My prints are on that pansy-lookin' bottle? Is dat what youse sayin'?

Japanese: それがいったい、なんやァッ！
English: Well, what the hell's in it anyway!?

Japanese: （ニセモノの裁判、ニセモノの弁護 ‥‥そしてニセモノの手がかり）
English: (A phony trial, a phony lawyer, and phony clues.)

Japanese: （すべてがニセモノだった、この 事件のカタをつけるのは‥‥）
English: (Everything about this case has been phony.)

Japanese: （やはり《ニセモノの証拠》こそが ふさわしい！）
English: (Seems like the perfect excuse for some phony evidence!)

Japanese: 芝九蔵さん。‥‥これは、 致命的な証拠品なのです！
English: Mr. Tigre! This is the decisive piece of evidence that will prove your guilt!

Japanese: なぜなら！ この小ビンに入っているのは‥‥
English: Why? Because it contains...

Japanese: （フツウに提出しても、 この証拠はイミを持たない！）
English: (The evidence on its own isn't worth anything.)

Japanese: （‥‥それならば、 もう、いっそ思いきって‥‥）
English: (I guess I'll just have to take the plunge and...)

Japanese: ちょ、ちょっと！ 待ってよ、なるほどくん！
English: W-Wait a minute, Nick!

Japanese: いくらなんでも、 アロマテラピーはないでしょ！
English: Aromatherapy oil's not going to help anyone now, is it!?

Japanese: ‥‥弁護人！
English: Mr. Wright!

Japanese: ここまできて、イチかバチかの ギャンブルは認めませんぞ！
English: If you think I'll allow you to indulge in speculation at this stage, you're wrong!

Japanese: （もう一度‥‥考えてみよう！）
English: (Oops. Looks like I better reconsider.)

Japanese: （“勝ち”をカクシンした、 芝九蔵　虎ノ助の‥‥）
English: (I've got to take advantage of the fact that The Tiger thinks he's won...)

Japanese: （心理の弱点をつく、 《ワナ》を仕掛けるんだ！）
English: (...and lead him into a trap!)

Japanese: （《ニセモノの証拠》を使って！）
English: (And a phony piece of evidence is the way to do it!)

Japanese: もちろんこれは、 被害者・岡　高夫さんの、耳のクス
English: As we all know, this bottle contains Glen Elg's medic--

Japanese: ちょ、ちょっと！ 待ってよ、なるほどくん！
English: What are you doing, Nick!?

Japanese: “被害者のクスリビンに指紋が ついていても、イミがない”‥‥
English: What did you just tell Gumshoe and I outside in the lobby a few minutes ago?

Japanese: さっき、自分で そう言ってたじゃない！
English: You said, "The fact that his prints are on this bottle makes no difference now!"

Japanese: そ、そうだったっけ‥‥
English: Oh, yeah...

Japanese: これは‥‥青酸カリが 入っていたビンなのです。
English: This is the bottle containing the potassium cyanide.

Japanese: せ‥‥せいさんかり‥‥？
English: P-Potassium cyanide...?

Japanese: 岡　高夫さんの殺害に 使用された、猛毒です。
English: The poison used to murder Mr. Elg, Your Honor.

Japanese: 犯行に使われたのは‥‥ この小ビンだった！
English: The victim's killer used this very bottle!

Japanese: その、猛毒の小ビンから あなたの指紋が発見された。
English: And on this bottle, Mr. Tigre, we found your fingerprints.

Japanese: いかがですか、証人ッ！
English: Well!? How do you explain that!?

Japanese: ハァッハッハッハッハッハッハァ！ ‥‥ケッサクやなァ、アンタ‥‥
English: Ha ha ha ha ha! You'd make a good clown, you' know that!

Japanese: な‥‥なんですか？
English: What!?

Japanese: いくらニラんでもムダや、ムダァ！ ホンマ、笑わせてくれるワ‥‥
English: Youse ain't never gonna get this to stick. Youse just makin' me laugh now.

Japanese: そんな安ぅいハッタリで‥‥ ゼニトラをダマせると思ォたか？
English: You' think a cheap bluff like that's gonna fool The Tiger?

Japanese: は、《ハッタリ》ですって‥‥？
English: A bluff?

Japanese: ミエミエのシバイ、打つなやァ！ 成歩堂　龍一ィィッ！
English: I can see straight through you, Phoenix Wright!

Japanese: そいつは、青酸カリが入っていた ビンやないでェッ！
English: That ain't the bottle with the cyanide in it.

Japanese: し、しかし！　たしかに このビンには、猛毒が‥‥
English: No, no. This is the bottle we found traces of the poison in.

Japanese: このゼニトラァ！ ナメたらメチャ、しょっぱいでェ！
English: Don't mess with The Tiger or you're gonna get ripped to shreds!

Japanese: 青酸カリの入ったビンは、 茶色い、ガラスビンや！
English: The cyanide bottle was brown. And it was made of glass.

Japanese: そォんなセコい小ビン‥‥、 ゼンゼンちがうやないかアァッ！
English: That cheap piece of trash don't look nothin' like it!

Japanese: （これで‥‥終わった‥‥）
English: (Got him! At last...)

Japanese: な‥‥なんや？
English: Wh-What?

Japanese: なんで‥‥みんなダマっとるんや！ そ、その小ビンは‥‥
English: Why's everyone gone quiet? I said that bottle...

Japanese: あなたの言っているビン‥‥ これのことですか？
English: Is this the bottle you're referring to?

Japanese: そうや！　それやッ！ 青酸カリが入っていたのはッ！
English: Yeah! That's it! That's the bottle the cyanide was in.

Japanese: その茶色のビンに‥‥ ワイの指紋はついとらんハズや！
English: But youse ain't gonna find my prints on that bottle!

Japanese: み‥‥みんな、この弁護士に ダマされたら、アカンで！
English: Don't let that cozy-lookin' suit fool you people! That lawyer's just playin' games!

Japanese: 検事さんよォ！　アンタも なんか言うてくれやッ！
English: Tell him, Godot! Tell that guy where to go!

Japanese: ‥‥‥まだ‥‥‥ わからねえのか？
English: You still haven't figured it out...?

Japanese: 自分が今、何を言ったのか‥‥
English: Don't you realize what you just said?

Japanese: ど‥‥‥どういうコト、や‥‥？
English: What I said? What did I just say?

Japanese: あなたは、さっき初めて、 この法廷に召喚されてきました。
English: You were summoned to this court for the first time earlier today.

Japanese: もし、この殺人事件に 関係がないのならば‥‥
English: If you really had nothing to do with the murder...

Japanese: 知っているハズがないんですよ。
English: ...you shouldn't have known all the little details.

Japanese: 青酸カリが、どんなビンに 入っていたか、なんて‥‥ね。
English: For instance, you shouldn't have known what kind of bottle the potassium cyanide was in.

Japanese: あ‥‥ああああ‥‥！
English: Err... grrr...

Japanese: あなたは、たった今 認めたんです！
English: But just now, you slipped up in front of every single person in this courtroom.

Japanese: 自分自身が犯行に使用した、 猛毒の小ビンを！
English: You described the exact bottle used by the killer to hold the poison!

Japanese: う‥‥ううう‥‥ッ！
English: Err... ummm...

Japanese: そんな、アホな！ ‥‥この、ゼニトラが‥‥
English: Youse don't know who youse messin' with!

Japanese: 億単位のカネを動かす、闇金融の プリンスがァァァ‥‥
English: I'm The Tiger! I control millions of dollars on the black market!

Japanese: こんな、ワカゾウに‥‥ッ！
English: Youse think I'm gonna let some jumped-up suit get the better of me!?

Japanese: たしかに‥‥最後の証拠品は ニセモノでした。
English: Sure, the last piece of evidence was phony.

Japanese: しかし！　あなたには ニセモノの証拠こそ、ふさわしい！
English: But that's just what you deserve!

Japanese: ‥‥ニセモノの裁判、 ニセモノの弁護士‥‥
English: The phony trial with a phony lawyer...

Japanese: そして、あなた自身！ すべてがニセモノだったのです！
English: It was all played out by you, the biggest phony of all!

Japanese: ぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐ
English: Grrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr...

Japanese: ウオガァアアアアアアアアアアアア アアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア
English: Gwoaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

Japanese: アアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア アアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア
English: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

Japanese: アアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア アアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア
English: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

Japanese: アアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア アアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア
English: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

Japanese: アアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア アアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア
English: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

Japanese: アアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア アアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア
English: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

Japanese: な‥‥‥ナニゴトですかッ！
English: Wh-What's going on!?

Japanese: どうやら‥‥停電のようです！
English: It looks like a blackout.

Japanese: やってくれたな‥‥まるほどう‥‥
English: Well done... Trite.

Japanese: ‥‥１７杯目のコーヒーは、 アンタにおごっておくぜ。
English: I saved my 17th cup of coffee just for you.

Japanese: ゆっくり、味わうがいいさ‥‥
English: Savor it...

Japanese: ‥‥アンタのエモノを ながめながら、な‥‥。
English: While you watch your caged prey.

Japanese: ‥‥今度こそ‥‥ 終わったのですね。
English: Wright, you caught a tiger by his toe, but if this one hollers, he won't be let go.

Japanese: ゴドー検事。 芝九蔵　虎ノ助は？
English: The prosecution will be sure to take care of Mr. Tigre, won't you, Mr. Godot?

Japanese: ‥‥緊急逮捕した。 岡　高夫・殺害容疑、だ‥‥。
English: He is being arrested on suspicion of the murder of Glen Elg, Your Honor.

Japanese: どうやら、ワレワレは‥‥
English: Fortunately for us...

Japanese: 恐るべきあやまちを、ただすことが できたようですね。
English: ...we managed to rectify a very grave error.

Japanese: 弁護士不在のまま、 判決を下してしまった、という‥‥
English: Ms. Byrde was found guilty in the absence of a genuine defense attorney.

Japanese: ‥‥そうですね。
English: Yes, she was.

Japanese: 証拠は‥‥なかった。
English: And in the absence of genuine evidence.

Japanese: ヤツの、たったヒトコトさえ なければ‥‥
English: But The Tiger made one mistake.

Japanese: ‥‥そのとおり。
English: Indeed.

Japanese: 芝九蔵　虎ノ助は‥‥ ツミを逃れていたかもしれません。
English: He very nearly got away with everything if it wasn't for that one slip of the tongue.

Japanese: 恐ろしい‥‥犯人でしたな。
English: Furio Tigre is a truly frightening criminal.

Japanese: クッ‥‥！
本当に恐ろしかったのは‥‥
English: The truly frightening one...

Japanese: そこの弁護人だった‥‥のかも、 しれねえな‥‥
English: ...is that defense attorney over there.

Japanese: （‥‥ゴドー検事‥‥）
English: (Godot...)

Japanese: 何はともあれ‥‥ 決着は今、つきました。
English: Well. I am now in a position to deliver my verdict.

Japanese: 被告人・須々木　マコに、 改めて判決を言いわたします！
English: This court finds the defendant, Maggey Byrde...

Japanese: ‥‥では、本日はこれにて閉廷！
English: That is all. This court is adjourned!

Japanese: 同日　午後　４時１０分 地方裁判所　被告人第１控え室
English: January 8, 4:10 PM District Court Defendant Lobby No. 1

Japanese: な、成歩堂さん！ アタシは‥‥スズキは‥‥‥
English: Mr. Wright! I-I-I...

Japanese: もー、なんと言っていいかッ！ ありがとうございましたッ！
English: I'm at a loss for words! Thank you, sir!

Japanese: おめでとう！　マコちゃん！
English: Congratulations, Maggey!

Japanese: １ヶ月前の裁判で、成歩堂さんに こっぴどくハメられたのも‥‥
English: I was so mad when Mr. Wright landed me in all that trouble a month ago.

Japanese: 今じゃ、ちょっぴり ユルせるキモチになりましたっ！
English: But now I feel like I can forgive him!

Japanese: い、いやいや！　だから、アレは 芝九蔵だったんだから‥‥
English: Hey! That wasn't me, Maggey! That was The Tiger.

Japanese: あ‥‥！　なるほどくん！ ‥‥あの、ドアのところ‥‥
English: Look, Nick! In the doorway!

Japanese: （‥‥い、イトノコ刑事‥‥！）
English: (Detective Gumshoe!)

Japanese: あ‥‥じゃッ！ そういうコトで‥‥！
English: Oh. Guess I'll be heading off then. See you 'round, pal.

Japanese: ま、待ってくださいよ！
English: W-Wait!

Japanese: イトノコセンパイ‥‥
English: Detective Gumshoe...

Japanese: あー、その。 マコクン、おめでとうッス！
English: Uh, oh yeah. Congratulations, Maggey!

Japanese: ‥‥ありがとうございます。
English: Thanks...

Japanese: じ、自分は信じていたッス！ マコクンの無実を‥‥
English: I-I knew you were innocent all along.

Japanese: そのコトバ、 証言の時に聞きたかったッス。
English: Why didn't you say that in your testimony then?

Japanese: むぐぎゅ！
English: Huh?

Japanese: あー‥‥と。その‥‥ なんッスねえ‥‥。
English: Oh... Well... I was...

Japanese: じゃッ！ そういうコトで‥‥！
English: Well, guess I'll be heading off then. See you 'round.

Japanese: ‥‥ちょっと！　イトノコ刑事！ （走っていっちまった‥‥）
English: Wait up, Detective! (He just ran off!)

Japanese: ま、マコちゃん！　いいの‥‥？
English: Maggey! Why are you being so hard on him?

Japanese: イトノコさん、マコちゃんのために がんばったんだよ！
English: He busted his butt for you!

Japanese: このクスリビンだって、 イトノコさんが‥‥
English: It's thanks to him that we got the medication bottle...

Japanese: そんなの、ケッキョク 役に立たなかったッス！
English: That wasn't even any use!
But...

Japanese: 成歩堂さんが、うまく 使ってくれたから‥‥
English: It's only because Mr. Wright used it so cleverly.

Japanese: センパイは、ただひたすら、 カラ回りしてただけッス！
English: Detective Gumshoe was just running around in circles.

Japanese: （‥‥やれやれ）
English: (Poor guy...)

Japanese: イトノコ刑事のコト‥‥ まだ、ユルせないみたいだね。
English: Looks like she still isn't ready to forgive him.

Japanese: ね。なるほどくん‥‥。 なんとかしてあげられないの？
English: Can't you put in a good word for him, Nick?

Japanese: （そうだなあ‥‥）
English: (Yeah, Maya is right. I should help Gumshoe out. It's clear he needs it.)

Japanese: ‥‥ねえ、マコちゃん。
English: Uh, Maggey...

Japanese: イトノコ刑事は、いつもきみの コトをシンパイしてたんだよ。
English: You know, Detective Gumshoe's been really worried about you through all of this.

Japanese: 自分も、そう信じて いたかったッス。‥‥でも！
English: I wanted to believe that, sir.

Japanese: １日目の裁判‥‥
English: But on that first day of the trial...

Japanese: センパイの証言で、スズキ‥‥ あやうく、死にかけたッス！
English: ...he practically gave the judge a free pass to lock me up!

Japanese: ‥‥それは、しかたないよ。 彼は《刑事》だからね。
English: He didn't have any choice, Maggey. He's a detective. He has to report the facts.

Japanese: 自分を‥‥スズキのコトを、 ウタガってたに決まってるッス！
English: He doubted me, that's why! He thought I might have done it!

Japanese: （イトノコ刑事のキモチを、 彼女に伝えてあげよう）
English: (I've got to prove to her that Gumshoe really cares about her.)

Japanese: （マコちゃんへの、無罪判決の 《お祝い》だな‥‥）
English: (I know. I'll give her a little present to celebrate her freedom...)

Japanese: ‥‥‥？ あ、あの‥‥これ、なんですか？
English: Um... What's this?

Japanese: え！　ええと、マコちゃんの 無罪判決のお祝いに、って思って。
English: Huh!? Uh, I thought it'd be a good present. You know, to celebrate your freedom.

Japanese: ちょっと、よく わからないッスけど‥‥
English: Oh. Well, I don't really get it, but...

Japanese: ありがとうございます！ ダイジにするッス！
English: Thanks! I'll treasure it always!

Japanese: （どうやら‥‥ 大シッパイみたいだな‥‥）
English: (That didn't seem to do the trick...)

Japanese: じゃあ‥‥そろそろ、 シツレイしますね！
English: Well, I guess I'll be going now, then.

Japanese: マコちゃん。今度こそ、 いいことが待ってるよね！
English: Good things are going to happen to you from now on, Maggey. I'm sure of it.

Japanese: もちろんッス！ 今度こそ‥‥
English: Of course! No one can be that unlucky forever!

Japanese: いいニュースを伝えられるよう、 がんばるッス！
English: I'll do my best to have some good news to report to you next time we meet, sir!

Japanese: うん。待ってるよ。
English: Good. We'll look forward to it.

Japanese: ‥‥さようなら。 スズキ‥‥一生、忘れないッス！
English: Goodbye. I won't forget how you helped me.

Japanese: ニセモノだらけの物語は、 これでおしまいだ。
English: So the case of phony versus genuine comes to an end.

Japanese: マコちゃんをとり巻いていた いつわりは姿を消して‥‥
English: The false allegations surrounding Maggey have all been cleared up.

Japanese: ‥‥本当の物語が、これから 始まるのかもしれない‥‥
English: And who knows? Maybe a whole new chapter of her life is about to start...?

Japanese: ‥‥はい、これ。 無罪判決の、お祝い。
English: Here you are. A present to celebrate your freedom!

Japanese: こここ、これは‥‥！
English: Th-That's...!

Japanese: イトノコ刑事、入魂の プレゼントだよ。
English: A present from Detective Gumshoe, made with a ton of love.

Japanese: マコちゃん、ちょっと ヤセたみたいだから、って。
English: He said you lost weight and he was worried about you.

Japanese: せ‥‥センパイ‥‥
English: D-Detective Gumshoe...

Japanese: アタシ‥‥ I...
じつは、ウインナー‥‥ そんなにキライじゃないッス。
English: I actually really like weenies, you know.

Japanese: ‥ぐぎゅるるぐぐ‥‥ぅぅ‥‥う‥
English: ...Uuuggggrrrrrrrr...ggg...

Japanese: そういえば‥‥ おなかへったよねえ。
English: Did you guys hear that!? I'm pretty hungry myself, you know.

Japanese: ‥‥今日の裁判、ずいぶん 長くかかったからなあ。
English: Yeah, the trial dragged on a bit today, didn't it?

Japanese: ‥‥あの‥‥。 食べてもいいッスか？　これ‥‥。
English: Um, is it OK if I eat this now?

Japanese: ‥‥どう？　マコちゃん！
English: So? How is it, Maggey?

Japanese: ‥‥‥おいしいッス‥‥‥
English: It's... It's really good!

Japanese: ニセモノだらけの物語は、 これでおしまいだ。
English: So the case of phony versus genuine comes to an end.

Japanese: マコちゃんをとり巻いていた いつわりは姿を消して‥‥
English: The false allegations surrounding Maggey have all been cleared up.

Japanese: ‥‥本当の物語が、これから 始まるのかもしれない‥‥
English: And who knows? Maybe a whole new chapter of her life is about to start...?

Japanese: ■第３話　逆転のレシピ おわり
English: Episode 3: Recipe for Turnabout THE END
